descriptions: A member switched affiliation from VIS to SIC, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Pantyu Pantev, a.k.a. "Polly" - Drug smuggler, initially affiliated with VIS, later with SIC.

Clan Russo dei Quartieri Spagnoli.description: Camorra clan operating in the Quartieri Spagnoli neighborhood of Naples, Italy. Founded by Domenico Russo, known as 'Mimì dei cani', and later led by his sons. Engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and a violent feud with the Di Biasi/Faiano clan. The clan emerged victorious and continues to dominate the area.

descriptions: Russo clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Russo clan had links with the Mafia

descriptions: Russo clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russo clan

descriptions: Alfieri clan listed Russo clan as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Russo clan

descriptions: Pasquale Russo's clan was allied with Clan Alfieri.
edges.evidence_quote: Pasquale Russo , boss dell' omonimo clan nolano

descriptions: Salvatore Russo's clan was allied with Clan Alfieri.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Russo , boss del clan omonimo , legato agli Alfieri

descriptions: The Russo clan threatened the Di Biasi's dominance in the neighborhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma il loro predominio nel quartiere è stato sempre in bilico e minacciato dal clan Russo.

descriptions: Russo clan had links with Cosa Nostra in the 1980s and 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: the Russo clan had links with the Mafia, particularly in the 1980s and 1990s, at the time of the Corleonesi Mafia era.

descriptions: Russo clan formed an alliance with Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new leaders of the Russo clan , from Nola , also formed an alliance with the Mazzarellas.

descriptions: Russo clan is listed as an ally of Moccia clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russo clan , Alfieri clan (defunct) , Licciardi clan , Galasso clan (defunct) , Sacco-Bocchetti clan , Contini clan

Taliban.description: The Taliban is a political and militant organization in Afghanistan, founded in 1994 by Mullah Omar. It ruled most of Afghanistan from 1996 to 2001, enforcing a strict interpretation of Sharia law, before being overthrown by a US-led invasion. After a 20-year insurgency, it recaptured Kabul in 2021 and now controls all of Afghanistan. The group is designated as a terrorist organization by several countries and is widely condemned for human rights abuses.

descriptions: Al-Qaeda shifted its base to Taliban-ruled Afghanistan, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: It then shifted its base to the Taliban-ruled Afghanistan

descriptions: Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan distanced itself from the Taliban after a Taliban operation against it.
edges.evidence_quote: The Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan both distanced themself from the Taliban and ended their allegiance after the Taliban's Zabul operation against it in 2014.

descriptions: Taliban banned association with IS Khorasan Province and labeled it a false sect.
edges.evidence_quote: After its 2022 Ulema gathering, the Taliban banned all Afghans from associating with the local Khorasan Province branch of IS in July 2022, and labelled it a 'false sect'.

edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents See list Afghanistan ( Taliban )

descriptions: ISKP and Taliban are in violent conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Since the Taliban took control of the Afghan central government ... the Taliban has been locked in a violent counterinsurgency against ISIS–K.

descriptions: ISIS–K and Taliban are in ongoing conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, ISIS–K is engaged in a protracted, low-intensity conflict with the Taliban government.

descriptions: ISIS–K and Taliban cooperated in joint attack on Hazara villages.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 2017, the Taliban and ISIS–K jointly launched a major attack against some Hazara minority villages in northern Afghanistan

descriptions: Taliban supplied opiates to Kurdish mafia in exchange for tax.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban supplied the Kurdish mafia with opiates in exchange for a tax, and the guarantee that the opiates would not be sold to Kurdish civilians, but to Europeans or Russians only.

descriptions: LeT has a historically rocky relationship with the Taliban due to Salafi-Deobandi differences.
edges.evidence_quote: Lashkar-e-Taiba is also a Punjabi group, but its Ahl-e Hadith faith (Salafi) and close relationship with the Pakistani military establishment have contributed to a historically rocky relationship with Deobandi militant groups and other Anti-Salafi Taliban elements, thus, the Taliban has a less ideological interest in letting LeT operate from Afghan soil.

descriptions: Lashkar-e-Taiba ended its allegiance to the Taliban leader, indicating a break in cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Lashkar-e-Taiba, which have allegedly close ties to Pakistan's intelligence agency, have allied with IS-KP and ended their allegiance to Mullah Hibatullah.

descriptions: LeT cultivated links with the first Taliban regime.
edges.evidence_quote: The outfit had also cultivated links with the first Taliban regime in Afghanistan and also with Osama bin Laden and his al-Qaeda network.

descriptions: LeT assisted the Taliban in Afghanistan in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The outfit had claimed that it had assisted the Taliban militia and Osama bin Laden's al-Qaeda network in Afghanistan during November and December 2002 in their fight against the US-aided Northern Alliance.

descriptions: The text notes similarities in drug trade reliance between FARC and Taliban, but no direct relationship.

Santa.description: The Santa, also known as Società maggiore, is a high-level criminal organization within the 'Ndrangheta, founded in the mid-1970s in Calabria, Italy. Members, called santisti, are among the highest ranks of the Calabrian mafia hierarchy. The group facilitates contacts with non-members, including police, politicians, and especially Freemasonry. It is believed that santisti from various locali meet annually in Africo.

descriptions: Santa was created within 'Ndrangheta as a subgroup.
edges.evidence_quote: nata a metà degli anni settanta in seno alla 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Vangelo is a higher rank within the Società maggiore, above Santa.
edges.evidence_quote: un grado superiore il Vangelo

descriptions: Mantella seeks support from Commisso against Mancuso, indicating conflict with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: altre meno potenti del vibonese come gli Anello , i Fiumara, gli Emanuele di Gerocarne , i Vallelunga , i Tassone, i Mantella, i Bonavota e i Piscopisani cercano appoggio nei Commisso

descriptions: Stasi trained Abu Nidal members.
edges.evidence_quote: Similar treatment was meted out to Palestinian terrorists from ... Abu Nidal

'Ndrina Bubbo.description: The Bubbo are a 'ndrina of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta operating in Petronà, Cerva, and Sersale, allied with the Nicoscia, Farao-Marincola, and Trovato clans. They have been involved in arms sales and are part of the 'Locale di Galbiate' in Lecco, Lombardy. In the 1990s, they engaged in a feud with the Carpino clan, resulting in multiple murders and attempted murders. In 2020, members were arrested in Operation Borderland.

descriptions: The Barbaro are allied with the Bubbo.
edges.evidence_quote: tra questi i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo , dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: The Bubbo and the Carpino were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: faida nella pre-sila catanzarese tra i Bubbo e i Carpino

edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei ... Farao-Marincola del crotonese

descriptions: The Bubbo are allied with the Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Nicoscia

descriptions: The Bubbo sold weapons to the Paparo.
edges.evidence_quote: Avrebbero venduto delle armi ai Paparo

descriptions: The Bubbo killed a member of the Trataculo, leading to a retaliation attempt by the Trataculo against the Bubbo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 febbraio 2000 viene ucciso a Petronà Alberto Carpino della 'ndrina dei Trataculo. Come ritorsione, nel 2001, due loro affiliati ... sarebbero stati in procinto di andare a Galbiate per eliminare Filippo Bubbo

descriptions: The Bubbo are allied with the Trovato.

Tanglewood Boys.description: The Tanglewood Boys was an Italian-American recruitment gang or 'farm team' for the Lucchese crime family, operating from the Tanglewood Shopping Center in Yonkers, New York. Active from the 1990s to the 2000s, the gang was involved in murders, assaults, armed robbery, arsons, and bookmaking in Westchester County, the Bronx, and the Upper West Side. Many members were sons of made men. The gang's downfall followed high-profile murders and subsequent prosecutions.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Tanglewood Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sicilian Mafia , Camorra , 'Ndrangheta , various independent Italian-American gangs (such as the 10th & Oregon Crew , Purple Gang , and Tanglewood Boys )

descriptions: The American Mafia lists the Tanglewood Boys as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Sicilian Mafia , Camorra , 'Ndrangheta , Sacra corona unita , varias pandillas independientes ítaloestadounidenses (como la 10th & Oregon Crew , Purple Gang , South Brooklyn Boys , y Tanglewood Boys ) , mafia judía , mafia griega , mafia corsa , varias pandillas de motociclistas (como los Hells Angels , Outlaws y Pagans ) , varias pandillas callejeras (tales como los Latin Kings ) , ocasionalmente la mafia albanesa y la mafia rusa

descriptions: American Mafia lists Tanglewood Boys as an ally.

Toonerville Rifa 13.description: Mexican-American street gang based in Atwater Village, Los Angeles County, founded in the 1930s. Engages in murder, assault, drug trafficking, racketeering, and other crimes. Claims Atwater Village as its turf and has chapters in Glendale and Georgia. Allied with Mexican Mafia and Sureños, rivals with multiple other gangs.

descriptions: D'Aquila fought against the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: D'Aquila was a member of the Lupo gang before leading his own faction.
edges.evidence_quote: D'Aquila was an influential emigrant from Palermo who joined the Lupo gang based in East Harlem.

descriptions: D'Aquila and Masseria were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1920, D'Aquila's only significant rival was Giuseppe "Joe the Boss" Masseria.

descriptions: D'Aquila absorbed the Mineo gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Soon after, D'Aquila absorbed the Mineo gang, making Mineo his first lieutenant.

descriptions: D'Aquila allied with the Morello family against the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: The friendly relationship between Bilal Alameddine and the Ahmads ended.
edges.evidence_quote: the friendliness between Bilal Alameddine and the Ahmads had, at latest, came to an end by then- if it hadn't already years prior.

descriptions: Bilal Alameddine wrote a friendly letter to Mahmoud Ahmad, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Bilal Alameddine wrote a friendly letter to Mahmoud 'Brownie' Ahmad

descriptions: The Comancheros and Ahmads were involved in a shooting conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Comanchero Motorcycle Club ... and the Ahmads, close allies of the Hamzys, were involved in a 2-and-a-half week spat of shootings

descriptions: The Elmir and Ahmad families were at war starting in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: The war began when Safwan Charbaji, a relative of Steven Elmir, was shot to death at a smash-repair shop by Walid 'Wally' Ahmad in April 2016.

descriptions: The Ahmads are close allies of the Hamzys.
edges.evidence_quote: the Ahmads, close allies of the Hamzys

Ashkenazum.description: Organized crime group active in Argentina in the early 20th century, founded by Simon Rubinstein as a splinter from Zwi Migdal. Specialized in sex trafficking of Eastern European Jewish girls and silk smuggling. Operated in Buenos Aires with 700 agents at its peak.

descriptions: The infobox lists Zwi Migdal as an ally of Ashkenazum.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zwi Migdal

descriptions: Ashkenazum was a splinter group that broke away from Zwi Migdal.
edges.evidence_quote: Ashkenazum was founded by Simon Rubinstein as a splinter group from the larger Zwi Migdal

descriptions: Ashkenazum is a splinter group that split from Zwi Migdal.
edges.evidence_quote: Zwi Migdal later split and a splinter group led by Simon Rubinstein established its own society named Ashkenazum.

descriptions: Liwa Ahrar al-Raqqa reportedly clashed with YPG.
edges.evidence_quote: some Arab sources reported that Liwa Ahrar al-Raqqa clashed with the YPG

descriptions: Liwa Ahrar al-Raqqa is an SDF component group.
edges.evidence_quote: Some members of Jabhat Thuwar al-Raqqa left the group and joined the SDF's Liwa Ahrar al-Raqqa

Bloque Meta.description: Colombian drug trafficking and neo-paramilitary organization active in the Colombian armed conflict. It emerged from the ERPAC after the AUC demobilized in 2006, and later merged into Los Puntilleros. The group was considered one of Colombia's most brutal drug trafficking organizations, with around 260 members. It was completely dismantled after the capture of its last leader in September 2017.

descriptions: Clan del Golfo proposed to buy the Bloque Meta from its leader Jhonatan.
edges.evidence_quote: alias Jhonatan fue contactado por Dairo Antonio Úsuga David; alias Otoniel , líder de la banda criminal Clan del Golfo , para proponerle la venta del Bloque Meta a este grupo criminal

edges.target: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: Bloque Meta partly formed from ERPAC after its disintegration.
edges.evidence_quote: When the AUC demobilized in 2006, many former members of the organization formed ERPAC, which would later partly become the Bloque Meta

descriptions: Bloque Meta and Libertadores del Vichada fought each other over drug trafficking control.
edges.evidence_quote: These groups fight each other over the control of drug trafficking in the eastern Meta department.

descriptions: Bloque Meta and Libertadores del Vichada were reunited under the name Los Puntilleros.
edges.evidence_quote: the two blocs were in the hands of the drug trafficker Mauricio Pachón Rozo, also known as "Puntilla", reunited the two groups; This time with a new name: "Los Puntilleros"

descriptions: Los Rastrojos bought the Bloque Meta franchise in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos habrían comprado en 2013 la franquicia del Bloque Meta

descriptions: Bloque Meta fought against FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: to continue the counterrevolutionary struggle against the FARC in Colombia's eastern plains.

descriptions: Bloque Meta originated from former AUC members.
edges.evidence_quote: Bloque Meta's history can be traced back to the United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia, or AUC.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: Bloque Meta is one of the two blocks into which ERPAC split after demobilization.
edges.evidence_quote: El ERPAC quedó dividido en 2 bloques después de la desmovilización del grupo original: El Bloque Meta

descriptions: Libertadores del Vichada and Meta Block are described as rivalling each other.
edges.evidence_quote: the remaining 600 were believed to have joined Libertadores de Vichada or the rivalling Meta Block.

Clan Cava.description: The Clan Cava is a Camorra syndicate based in Quindici, in the province of Avellino, Italy. It has been involved in a bloody feud with the rival Graziano clan for over thirty years. The clan's most influential bosses were the Cava brothers, including Emiliano, Lorenzo, Biagio, and Antonio. Despite state crackdowns and internal weakening, the clan remains active and is considered the most influential in the province of Avellino, with branches in Naples, Salerno, and other regions.

descriptions: Alfieri clan listed Cava Clan as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cava Clan

descriptions: Clan Cava was associated with the powerful Clan Alfieri during the 1980s Camorra wars.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la guerra di camorra tra NCO cutoliana e la Nuova Famiglia , che insanguinò la Campania negli anni '80, i Cava rientrarono nella miriade di clan e gruppi di fuoco associati al potente clan Alfieri

descriptions: Cava was part of the Clan dei Quindiciari alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cava, i Graziano ed altre famiglie criminali erano strette in un'alleanza che formava quello che, un tempo, era detto Clan dei Quindiciari.

descriptions: The Cava clan was part of the unified Clan dei Quindiciari together with the Graziano and other families.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan era già attivo durante gli anni Sessanta e, congiuntamente agli attuali rivali dei Cava e ad altre famiglie criminali, formava un unico gruppo camorristico, denominato "Clan dei Quindiciari".

descriptions: Clan Cava has alliances with Clan Russo and Clan Fabbrocino in the Nola area.
edges.evidence_quote: Ancora oggi, quello schieramento di parte si rispecchia nelle alleanze che i Cava hanno con altri gruppi criminali dell' agro nolano come i clan Russo di Nola e Fabbrocino

descriptions: Clan Cava reached an understanding with Clan Genovese and Clan Meriani, avoiding conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: L'estensione dell'egemonia dei Cava sul territorio della città di Avellino non poteva prescindere dall'instaurarsi di rapporti con organizzazioni ivi operanti (clan Genovese dell' area del Partenio e Meriani di Montoro ), che potevano risolversi o in un conflitto o nel raggiungimento di un'intesa. Di fatto, è stata praticata la seconda delle opzioni

descriptions: Clan Cava and Clan Genovese are closely linked and cooperate in extortion.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 febbraio 2016 ... avvalendosi della loro appartenenza ai clan Cava e Genovese (clan, quest'ultimo, operante nell'hinterland avellinese e strettamente collegato ai Cava)

descriptions: The two clans were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Cava e i Graziano

descriptions: Clan Cava has been in a bloody feud with Clan Graziano for over thirty years.
edges.evidence_quote: Questa cosca , da oltre trent'anni, è protagonista di una sanguinosa faida con l'altro clan del Vallo di Lauro, quello dei Graziano .

descriptions: Clan Graziano plotted to kill Salvatore Cava and his mother, indicating conflict with Clan Cava.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º agosto 2019 sono stati arrestati 5 esponenti del clan Graziano , che stavano tramando l'eliminazione di Salvatore Cava (figlio del boss Biagio e scarcerato nel maggio dello stesso anno) e della madre di Salvatore Cava

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were in a feud (faida) since the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: La mattanza fu conseguenza della faida che, già dai primi anni '80, vedeva contrapposti i Cava ed i Graziano.

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were formerly allies before the 1980 earthquake.
edges.evidence_quote: Le due potenti cosche - un tempo alleate - entrano in guerra a seguito del Terremoto dell'Irpinia del 1980

descriptions: Clan Cava reached an understanding with Clan Genovese and Clan Meriani, avoiding conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: L'estensione dell'egemonia dei Cava sul territorio della città di Avellino non poteva prescindere dall'instaurarsi di rapporti con organizzazioni ivi operanti (clan Genovese dell' area del Partenio e Meriani di Montoro ), che potevano risolversi o in un conflitto o nel raggiungimento di un'intesa. Di fatto, è stata praticata la seconda delle opzioni

descriptions: Individuals acted as referents for both Clan Cava and Clan Ruocco-Somma, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2015 vengono arrestati Bruno Giugliano ... e Salvatore Notaro ... ritenuti i referenti nel Nolano dei clan "Cava" di Quindici e "Ruocco-Somma" di Piazzolla di Nola

descriptions: Clan Cava has alliances with Clan Russo and Clan Fabbrocino in the Nola area.
edges.evidence_quote: Ancora oggi, quello schieramento di parte si rispecchia nelle alleanze che i Cava hanno con altri gruppi criminali dell' agro nolano come i clan Russo di Nola e Fabbrocino

descriptions: Members of Clan Cava, Clan Moccia, and Clan Russo were arrested together for usury and extortion, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In data 17 giugno 2011 ... sottoponevano a fermo di Polizia Giudiziaria 5 pregiudicati esponenti dei clan Cava di Quindici , Moccia di Afragola e Russo di Nola , ritenuti responsabili dei reati di usura ed estorsione aggravata

descriptions: A Cava affiliate had ties with the Genovese family boss Adolfo Bruno.
edges.evidence_quote: Michele Palmese ... aveva tessuto rapporti con Adolfo Bruno - boss della famiglia Genovese

descriptions: Clan Cava, Clan Russo, and Clan Moccia plotted together against Antonio Guerriero.
edges.evidence_quote: Stando a quanto dichiarato dal pentito di Nola Ciro Di Domenico, a tramare contro Guerriero furono tre clan (i Cava, i Russo e i Moccia ) .

descriptions: Members of Clan Cava, Clan Moccia, and Clan Russo were arrested together for usury and extortion, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In data 17 giugno 2011 ... sottoponevano a fermo di Polizia Giudiziaria 5 pregiudicati esponenti dei clan Cava di Quindici , Moccia di Afragola e Russo di Nola , ritenuti responsabili dei reati di usura ed estorsione aggravata

descriptions: The Cava clan joined the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: adesione ... dei Cava alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Cava joined the Nuova Famiglia in the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: l'adesione dei Cava alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Nuovo Clan Partenio was formed by former Cava affiliates operating without Cava's approval, indicating a splinter group with potential conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 ottobre 2019 è stato disarticolato un gruppo criminale ribattezzato "Nuovo Clan Partenio" ... Tra gli arrestati ... figurano alcuni pregiudicati in passato ritenuti legati ai Cava, che avevano costituito il sodalizio di propria iniziativa, operando senza il beneplacito dei Cava

descriptions: Nuovo Ordine di Zona was led by Antonio Guerriero, who is considered linked to Clan Cava.
edges.evidence_quote: Da segnalare anche il blitz avvenuto in data 3 ottobre 2016 , che ha visto coinvolti numerosi comuni del Mandamento baianese, che ha scardinato una organizzazione dedita alle estorsioni e al racket del cemento, ribattezzata "Nuovo Ordine di Zona" e guidata dal pregiudicato di Avella Antonio Guerriero (alias "Zorro"), soggetto considerato legato al clan Cava

descriptions: Sangermano clan was formerly a branch (propaggine) of Cava.
edges.evidence_quote: Agostino Sangermano — oggi indicato quale capo dell'omonimo gruppo criminale, reputato attivo in alcuni comuni del nolano e un tempo propaggine dei Cava.

descriptions: The Sangermano family was a satellite group of Clan Cava, later split off as independent.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel Nolano, nella fattispecie, i Cava hanno sempre operato mediante un gruppo satellite facente capo alla famiglia Sangermano, originaria di San Paolo Bel Sito , oggi considerata scissa dal clan Cava ed una organizzazione a sé stante.

descriptions: Fabbrocino was historically strongly linked to the Cava clan.
edges.evidence_quote: un tempo fortemente legata ai clan Cava e Russo

descriptions: Graziano and Cava have been in a decade-long faida since the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Quindici : faida più che decennale tra le famiglie Graziano e Cava

descriptions: The Graziano clan has been in a fierce conflict with the Cava clan for decades.
edges.evidence_quote: Da decenni è coinvolto in un feroce conflitto, nel quale è contrapposto al clan Cava.

descriptions: The Graziano and Cava clans were previously allied in a single clan before splitting.
edges.evidence_quote: I due clan, fino ad allora alleati in un unico clan, si scindono.

descriptions: These three sets formed the ATF alliance together.
edges.evidence_quote: the Acacia Blocc Compton Crips, Farm Dog Compton Crips and Spook Town Compton Crips were united in an alliance called "ATF".

descriptions: These three sets formed the ATF alliance together.
edges.evidence_quote: the Acacia Blocc Compton Crips, Farm Dog Compton Crips and Spook Town Compton Crips were united in an alliance called "ATF".

descriptions: Nutty Blocc Compton Crips are rivals with Farm Dog Compton Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Acacia Blocc Compton Crips , Farm Dog Compton Crips , Spook Town Compton Crips

descriptions: Al-Nusra Front was allied with Turkistan Islamic Party.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Turkistan Islamic Party

descriptions: Al-Nusra was allied with Turkistan Islamic Party.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Turkistan Islamic Party

descriptions: Turkistan Islamic Party is a non-state ally of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Turkistan Islamic Party

descriptions: Turkistan Islamic Party is an ally of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Turkistan Islamic Party Turkistan Islamic Party in Syria

edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Turkistan Islamic Party Turkistan Islamic Party in Syria

descriptions: Turkistan Islamic Party is listed as a non-state ally of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Turkistan Islamic Party Turkistan Islamic Party in Syria

descriptions: The Turkistan Islamic Party allegedly conspired with the Grey Wolves in an assassination.
edges.evidence_quote: Youm7, an Egyptian news site picked up a document allegedly issued by the Army of Conquest (Jaish al-Fatah), which claimed that it conspired with the Turkistan Islamic Party and the Grey Wolves in the December 2016 assassination of Andrei Karlov, the Russian ambassador to Turkey.

descriptions: The Turkistan Islamic Party is listed as a non-state opponent of ISKP.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Non-state opponents Turkistan Islamic Party

descriptions: ISKP opposes Turkistan Islamic Party.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Non-state opponents Turkistan Islamic Party

descriptions: Turkistan Islamic Party is an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Non-state opponents Turkistan Islamic Party

descriptions: Turkistan Islamic Party is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies Turkistan Islamic Party

Thak Thak gang.description: A criminal group active in North India, especially the National Capital Region, that targets parked vehicles and uses distraction techniques to steal cash and valuables. The name derives from the onomatopoeia of knocking on vehicle windows. The gang frequently changes locations to evade arrest.

descriptions: Flower Park Rifa was a historical street clique of Westside Locos.
edges.evidence_quote: Flower Park Rifa

descriptions: The Grey Wolves are the youth wing of the MHP.
edges.evidence_quote: The Grey Wolves ... is a terrorist Turkish far-right political movement and the youth wing of the Nationalist Movement Party (MHP).

descriptions: Vanowen st Locos 13 is a rival of Westside Locos.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13, Vanowen st Locos 13

descriptions: Nice Time Kids is a rival of The Americans as it is affiliated with The British.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids

descriptions: Bacchus was pulled into the Hells Angels sphere through its alliance with Para-Dice Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, the Para-Dice Riders became closely allied to the Hells Angels, which likewise pulled the Bacchus into the Hells Angels sphere of friendly clubs.

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders opposed Hells Angels' dominance in Ontario until 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws and several affiliated independent clubs such as Satan's Choice and Para-Dice Riders were able to keep the Angels from assuming a dominant position in Ontario, Canada's most populous province until 2000.

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders members joined Hells Angels in a patch-over ceremony.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 December 2000, most of the Ontario biker gangs in a mass 'patch over' ... joined the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders patched over to become Hells Angels in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: The Satan's Choice, the Para-Dice Riders, the Los Lobos, and a number of other Ontario outlaw biker gangs all abandoned their old patches for the 'Death's Head' patch of the Angels

descriptions: Para-Dice Riders members patched over to the Hells Angels, indicating absorption.
edges.evidence_quote: This resulted in 168 members of the Para-Dice Riders, Satan's Choice, Lobos and Last Chance "patching" to the Angels.

descriptions: A faction of Loners joined the Para-Dice Riders after a split in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: The pro-Hells Angel faction led by Grano joined the Para-Dice Riders while a rump remained under Raso.

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Para-Dice Riders jointly operated a meth lab in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: A series of police raids in 1983 in Madoc discovered a methamphetamine factory operated jointly by Satan's Choice and the Para-Dice Riders that produced about $3.6 million worth of methamphetamine per month.

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Para-Dice Riders both patched over to Hells Angels on the same day, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Satan's Choice, along with most of the other major Ontario biker gangs, including the Loners, Lobos, and Para-Dice Riders, 'patched over' to the Hells Angels on December 29, 2000.

descriptions: Corleonesi allied with San Lorenzo family led by Giuseppe Giacomo Gambino.
edges.evidence_quote: Riina was backed by many of the allies he had spent the last decade gathering in the city, especially Francesco Madonia and Giuseppe Giacomo Gambino from San Lorenzo

descriptions: No direct relationship stated between Taliban and Hizb-i-Islami in the text.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban have taken a mixed stance on opium over the years.

descriptions: Three Brotherhood Alliance lists Karenni Nationalities Defence Force as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Non-state allies ... Karenni Nationalities Defence Force

descriptions: Eight Trey Gangster Crips are rivals of Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods , "Hoover factions", "Eight Trey Gangster Crip (83GC)"
